RAID LOG — Healthcare Pilot

Risks:
- Lead engineer is on leave
- API will be deprecated
- Scope creep happened
- Testing is behind schedule
- Vendor might be slow
- Training could be a problem
- Budget overruns possible
- Stakeholders might disagree
- Documentation is incomplete
- Audit might fail
- Clinic expansion is happening too fast
- Network issues sometimes
- We could lose data
- Security might be an issue
- Other clinics may want changes

Owner for everything: Project team
Mitigation for everything: Will monitor and escalate as needed.

(No assumptions, issues, or dependencies sections. Everything is filed as a risk.)
